ddls:
CREATE TABLE "outbreaks" (
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outbreak */,
  "disease" TEXT /* Name of the disease causing the outbreak */,
  "disease_type" TEXT /* Type of the disease (e.g., viral, bacterial) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the outbreak started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the outbreak ended */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the outbreak occurred */,
  "total_cases" INTEGER /* Total number of cases during the outbreak */,
  "total_deaths" INTEGER /* Total number of deaths during the outbreak */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the health official who reported the outbreak */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the outbreak */,
  "source_of_infection" TEXT /* Source of the infection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreaks_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES health_officials ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outbreak_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak this update belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the update */,
  "community" INTEGER /* Community affected by the outbreak */,
  "infected" INTEGER /* Number of infected individuals */,
  "affected" INTEGER /* Number of affected individuals */,
  "hospitalised" INTEGER /* Number of hospitalized individuals */,
  "critical" INTEGER /* Number of critical cases */,
  "dead" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "hd_area_affected" INTEGER /* Area affected by the outbreak */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "reported_cases" INTEGER /* Number of reported cases */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate in the community */,
  "quarantine_area" TEXT /* Area under quarantine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_updates_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outbreak_updates_community FOREIGN KEY ("community") REFERENCES communities ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communities" (
  "community_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the community */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the community */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the community */,
  "community_type" TEXT /* Type of the community (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("community_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the hospital */,
  "specialties" TEXT /* Specialties available in the hospital */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admission */,
  "outbreak_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outbreak this admission belongs to */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital where the patient was admitted */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient admitted */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date of admission */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date of discharge */,
  "treatment_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_admissions_outbreak_id FOREIGN KEY ("outbreak_id") REFERENCES outbreaks ("outbreak_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health official */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the health official */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the health official */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the health official */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)
column_names: Name of the disease causing the outbreak
Type of the disease (e.g., viral, bacterial)
Total number of cases during the outbreak
Total number of deaths during the outbreak
ID of the health official who reported the outbreak
ID of the outbreak this update belongs to
Type of the community (e.g., urban, rural)
ID of the outbreak this admission belongs to
ID of the hospital where the patient was admitted
Unique identifier for each health official
Contact information of the health official
